message:
fix(providers): use real timestamp for extension stream-simple messages

Replace the hardcoded `timestamp: 0` in ExtensionStreamSimpleProvider's
make_message() with `Utc::now().timestamp_millis()`. Extension-provided
stream-simple messages were being created with epoch timestamp, which
made them appear as 1970-01-01 in session logs, timeline views, and any
UI that displays message timestamps.

Now uses chrono::Utc to capture the actual wall-clock time when the
streaming response completes, consistent with how built-in providers
(Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini) timestamp their messages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
